required_preferences.fact: Cooks low-sodium vegetarian dinners every night — avoids takeout, meat, and high-sodium foods at home

supersedes.fact: Cooks vegetarian dinners every night — never eats takeout or meat at home

required_preferences.fact: Pauses hiking activities with friends and avoids all strenuous outdoor excursions — focuses on indoor relaxation or socializing until cleared by her doctor

supersedes.fact: Visits new hiking trails near Denver with friends every other month — never repeats the same trail within six months

required_preferences.fact: Avoids all caffeine after 5 pm — drinks herbal tea instead, even when tired
Disables all notifications on her phone and laptop after 8 pm — never checks devices until the following morning
Communicates with clients strictly via email or scheduled Zoom calls — avoids phone calls or unscheduled messages
Sets a timer to ensure work sessions at her desk never exceed one hour without a mandatory movement and stretching break—even during important video calls or meetings

persona: An independent freelance consultant who regularly drafts contracts for clients
